{{Infobox character
| name = The Lost Badarin
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Lost Badarin]] is a figure from a story who sought a princess in a tower.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Lost Badarin]] is a character in [[Alin]]'s story.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] used to tell the story of the Lost Badarin.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
